description: Request to flip scout `emit` for one scout or every scout on the project.

emit.description: Target emit posture. True lets the scout(s) write findings to the inbox; False is dry-run — the scout still runs and records findings but emits nothing.

ensure_source.description: When enabling emit, also enable the project's `signals_scout` / `cross_source_issue` SignalSourceConfig — the team-level source gate that emit also requires. Ignored when emit is False.

skill_name.description: A single `signals-scout-*` skill to target. Omit or pass null to apply to every scout config on the project.
